args: REPO_ROOT="${AXON_REPO_ROOT:-$PWD}" && cd "$REPO_ROOT" && AXON_HOME="${AXON_HOME:-$HOME/.axon}" && ENV_FILE="${AXON_ENV_FILE:-$AXON_HOME/.env}" && set -a && if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then source "$ENV_FILE"; elif [ -f ./.env ]; then source ./.env; fi && set +a && AXON_HOME="${AXON_HOME:-$HOME/.axon}" && export AXON_HOME AXON_DATA_DIR="${AXON_DATA_DIR:-$AXON_HOME}" AXON_LOG_FILE="${AXON_LOG_FILE:-$AXON_HOME/logs/mcporter-axon.log}" AXON_SQLITE_PATH="${AXON_SQLITE_PATH:-$AXON_HOME/mcporter-jobs.db}" AXON_LITE="${AXON_LITE:-0}" AXON_MCP_TRANSPORT=stdio AXON_PG_URL="${AXON_PG_MCP_URL:-${AXON_PG_URL:-}}" && exec ./target/debug/axon mcp
